$schema-comment: Maps Synapse DESIGN.md semantic slots to Tailwind palette references (palette.shade) and font-size scales. Edit this file to retune; sync-from-source.mjs reads it to regenerate templates/DESIGN.md.
$sizes-comment: Derived from frequency analysis of arbitrary tailwind values in synapse-workspace (see evidence/eval-*.json). Values appearing >=4 times across components+pages were promoted to semantic slots. Edit names freely; sync-from-source.mjs emits these verbatim under `sizes:`.
$governance-comment: Issue #3 (option C): sync owns only the blocks below that fully model the current templates/DESIGN.md — today that is `spacing` and `sizes`. `colors`, `typography`, `rounded`, and `components` are hand-edited in templates/DESIGN.md and intentionally not modelled here. Extending this file to cover them is the long-term option A and should be a deliberate follow-up, not a side-effect of `sync --write`.
